open_gaps: Tier 4 independent peer validation is not complete.
All retained protocol, runtime, and operator targets are now promoted to Tier 3 with preserved repository evidence, but no retained target is promoted to Tier 4.
Strict public independent claims remain unavailable until preserved external peer bundles exist for the full retained boundary.
Clean-checkout runtime validation in this checkpoint environment remains limited by missing published runtime dependencies or unavailable runner packages for some profiles.
